description_long: This is a sleek, modern jet airplane with a streamlined blue fuselage accented by a white and green stripe running along the side, reminiscent of the Italian Air Force aerobatic team livery. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with straight wings, each bearing roundels near the tips and white diagonal stripes. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and appears to be a tandem two-seat arrangement, suitable for training or aerobatic purposes. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from the rear. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a visible nose wheel and main gear under the wings. The overall design suggests a lightweight, agile jet suitable for urban airshows or training missions.
description: A blue, white, and green low-wing jet airplane with a tandem enclosed cockpit, tricycle landing gear, and conventional tail, styled for aerobatic or training use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuselage, white and green stripes, tandem cockpit, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit canopy, wing span with roundels, and the symmetry of the design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tail and wing markings.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full wing span, cockpit placement, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets; roundels and white diagonal stripes on each wing.
attribute_engine_type: twin jet engines mounted on the fuselage sides near the rear.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed tandem cockpit with a clear canopy, suitable for two seats.
